stable_commit.title: fix: harden gateway async pipeline and live verifiers

project_goal: Build a multimodal emotional-support virtual digital human system with text/voice/camera input, ASR, stage-controlled LLM response, avatar output, and replay/evaluation.

dialogue.notes: Use gpt-5.4 for dialogue and summary generation.

major_workstreams: Repository guideline and architecture document set
Detailed implementation plan and data specification
Enterprise data manifest, transcript workflow, and QC pipeline
MAGICDATA-based public Chinese ASR evaluation lane
Frontend shell, gateway, realtime session flow, export, and trace continuity
Recording controls, audio upload, preview/final ASR transcript flow
Dialogue-service schema gate, real LLM integration, stage machine, short-term memory, and dialogue summary
Post-review hardening for async IO, websocket delivery, MIME handling, env parsing, and verifier topology

notes: Current sampled review subset is mostly French.
Do not create Chinese gold references from the enterprise subset unless a fluent reviewer is available.
Latest stability pass fixed blocking gateway work inside async routes.
WebSocket duplicate/loss edge cases were fixed.
Parameterized MIME types like audio/webm;codecs=opus are now normalized.
Live verifier scripts now boot dialogue-service when orchestrator depends on it.

resume_rules: Read handoff-summary.md, then progress.md and architecture.md.
Continue from implementation plan step 28 unless redirected.
Use uv run for Python commands.
Commit and push only after passing checks.
Do not use rm for rollback; rollback through git.
